scenarios.description: childElementsList returns cached list on second call when shadowChildrenRef is non-null
scenarios.precondition: Element with two element children, first childElementsList called once
scenarios.expectedResult: second call to childElementsList returns same list instance without rebuilding

scenarios.description: childElementsList rebuilds list after mutation invalidates shadowChildrenRef
scenarios.precondition: Element with one child element, childElementsList called to cache, then appendElement invoked
scenarios.expectedResult: subsequent childElementsList returns new list including the new child
